Title: Prohibits contractors from submitting claims and receiving payment from subcontractors who are not pre-authorized by a contracting city agency
Summary: Prohibits contractors from submitting claims and receiving payment from subcontractors who are not pre-authorized by a contracting city agency; establishes penalties.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to prohibiting persons from submitting claims on behalf of subcontractors who were not pre-authorized by a contracting agency and receiving payment for the unauthorized claims
